function.name: mios_update
function.description: Check for and apply MiOS system updates via bootc. Can return current image status or stage new updates.

json.description: Return output in machine-readable JSON format. Mandatory for AI API calls.

check_only.description: Only check for updates without staging or applying them.

function.name: mios_status
function.description: Get detailed system and service status information for the MiOS node.

json.description: Return output in machine-readable JSON format.
